requirement_topic.en: Turkmenenergo Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727, and Project-Specific Settings
requirement_topic.zh: Turkmenenergo并网——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及项目专属设置
requirement_topic.zht: Turkmenenergo併網——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及項目專屬設置

summary.en: Turkmenistan's electricity sector is state-controlled through Turkmenenergo. Grid-connected solar PV inverter projects should be treated as requiring Turkmenenergo technical review, connection conditions, commissioning acceptance, and project-specific protection settings. The national low-voltage supply context is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, nominally the same as China. That voltage alignment reduces conversion risk, but it does not replace local grid acceptance. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence should be prepared as the IEC-aligned technical baseline for PV inverters, together with any Turkmenenergo requirements on frequency and voltage protection windows, reconnection delay, reactive power, harmonics, metering, SCADA or monitoring interface, and site commissioning.
summary.zh: 土库曼斯坦电力行业由Turkmenenergo国家管控。并网太阳能光伏逆变器项目应视为需要Turkmenenergo技术审查、接入条件、调试验收和项目专属保护设置。该国低压供电环境为单相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz，名义上与中国一致。这种电压对齐降低了转换风险，但不能替代当地并网验收。光伏逆变器应准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，作为IEC对齐技术基线，并结合Turkmenenergo关于频率和电压保护窗口、重连延迟、无功、谐波、计量、SCADA或监控接口及现场调试的任何要求。
summary.zht: 土庫曼斯坦電力行業由Turkmenenergo國家管控。併網太陽能光伏逆變器項目應視為需要Turkmenenergo技術審查、接入條件、調試驗收和項目專屬保護設置。該國低壓供電環境為單相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz，名義上與中國一致。這種電壓對齊降低了轉換風險，但不能替代當地併網驗收。光伏逆變器應準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，作為IEC對齊技術基線，並結合Turkmenenergo關於頻率和電壓保護窗口、重連延遲、無功、諧波、計量、SCADA或監控接口及現場調試的任何要求。

standards_or_laws: Turkmenenergo project-specific grid-connection and commissioning requirements for state-controlled electricity supply
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Project-specific Turkmenenergo settings for protection, metering, reactive power, communications, and commissioning

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, domestic anti-islanding test results, and China grid-operator acceptance files. China also uses a 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal grid, so basic voltage and frequency are aligned with Turkmenistan. However, Chinese grid certificates and settings are not Turkmenenergo approvals and do not prove compliance with Turkmenistan project-specific protection, commissioning, communications, or owner requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、国内防孤岛测试结果和中国电网运营商验收文件。中国同样采用220/380 V、50 Hz名义电网，因此基本电压和频率与土库曼斯坦一致。然而，中国并网证书和设置不是Turkmenenergo批准，也不能证明符合土库曼斯坦项目专属保护、调试、通信或业主要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、國內防孤島測試結果和中國電網運營商驗收文件。中國同樣採用220/380 V、50 Hz名義電網，因此基本電壓和頻率與土庫曼斯坦一致。然而，中國併網證書和設置不是Turkmenenergo批准，也不能證明符合土庫曼斯坦項目專屬保護、調試、通訊或業主要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid files are supporting documents only. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, an inverter firmware and protection-setting record for Turkmenistan 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, and a Turkmenenergo project submission package covering protection coordination, harmonics, reactive power, metering, monitoring interface, commissioning tests, and installer responsibilities. Because public PV rules are limited and solar deployment is nascent in a gas-rich state economy, confirm the applicable Turkmenenergo body and project approval path directly rather than assuming any standard EAEU, EAC, or TR CU route.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件仅为支持资料。出口商应准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、适用于土库曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz运行的逆变器固件和保护设置记录，以及覆盖保护配合、谐波、无功、计量、监控接口、调试测试和安装方责任的Turkmenenergo项目提交包。由于公开光伏规则有限，且在天然气资源丰富的国家经济中太阳能仍处于起步阶段，应直接确认适用的Turkmenenergo机构和项目审批路径，而不是假定存在任何标准EAEU、EAC或TR CU路径。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件僅為支持資料。出口商應準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、適用於土庫曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz運行的逆變器韌體和保護設置記錄，以及覆蓋保護配合、諧波、無功、計量、監控接口、調試測試和安裝方責任的Turkmenenergo項目提交包。由於公開光伏規則有限，且在天然氣資源豐富的國家經濟中太陽能仍處於起步階段，應直接確認適用的Turkmenenergo機構和項目審批路徑，而不是假定存在任何標準EAEU、EAC或TR CU路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV projects where Turkmenenergo project acceptance applies; public requirements are limited and project-specific connection terms should be obtained directly from Turkmenenergo
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may satisfy China domestic grid-operator expectations but is not transferable to Turkmenenergo project acceptance

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of Turkmenistan / Turkmenenergo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Turkmenistan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid aligns nominally with China, but Chinese GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021 documents do not replace Turkmenenergo grid acceptance. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and validate firmware, protection, metering, harmonics, reactive-power, communications, and commissioning settings for the exact Turkmenistan project. Do not use an EAC / TR CU route: Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土库曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz电网名义上与中国一致，但中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021文件不能替代Turkmenenergo并网验收。应为具体土库曼斯坦项目准备IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，并验证固件、保护、计量、谐波、无功、通信和调试设置。不得采用EAC / TR CU路径：土库曼斯坦不是EAEU成员。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土庫曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz電網名義上與中國一致，但中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021文件不能替代Turkmenenergo併網驗收。應為具體土庫曼斯坦項目準備IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，並驗證韌體、保護、計量、諧波、無功、通訊和調試設置。不得採用EAC / TR CU路徑：土庫曼斯坦不是EAEU成員。
